title: CleanSpark Reports Transformative FY 2025 Results with Record Revenue
text: CleanSpark surpassed 50 EH/s in operational hashrate and set new revenue records. Fiscal year revenues were $766.3 million, an increase of $387.3 million, or 102.2%, from $379 million for the same prior year period. However, for the fiscal year ended September 30, 2025, CleanSpark mined approximately 7,873 bitcoins, net of mining pool fees, representing a decrease of 11.0% compared to the 7,092 bitcoins mined in fiscal year 2024. This reduction was primarily due to the April 2024 bitcoin halving, which cut the per-block reward by 50%. CleanSpark released its unaudited December 2025 bitcoin mining update, reporting calendar-year production increase of more than 10% YoY with CY2025 bitcoin produced at 7,746. Fleet strength included an operational hashrate of 50.0 EH/s and 245,199 deployed miners. The company continues to demonstrate operational excellence in a challenging environment.
